article_title: B.C. Reg. 286/2024 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC Electrical Power Corporation property assessment rates updated for 2025 tax year
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 286/2024 updates the Electrical Power Corporations Valuation Regulation, replacing 2024 per-circuit-kilometre valuation rates with new 2025 figures across all transmission and distribution line classes.
briefs.action_required: Review updated per-circuit-kilometre rates to assess impact on your 2025 property tax assessments.

key_dates.label: BC Electrical Power Corporations Valuation Regulation 2025 rates take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 286/2024 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
